node.html:
I'm a software developer with a goal-driven creative mindset and passion for learning and innovating.

Currently working as a Full Stack Software Developer with a focus on building innovative tools for end users. I've worked with many of the leading cloud providers including AWS, GCP, and Azure.

Outside work, I love spending time being active in the great outdoors!

Hello! I was introduced to programming at the University of Calgary where I completed my Bachelors in Computer Science.

I'm currently working as a developer building systems for several clients and projects. My responsibilities include all aspects of the software development lifecycle. I've been fortunate to work on projects in a variety of industries including Mining, Oil & Gas, Technology, Utilities, Agriculture, Telecommunications, and Transportation.

Here is a list of the technologies that I'm familiar with!

Market Research Client (2021 - Present)

  • Develop application features for the data transformation portal application used by business market research scientists. Technologies include: C#, Python, Node JS, Typescript, Javascript, HTML, CSS, Git, BigQuery, SQL, AWS, GCP.

Agriculture Client (2020 - 2020)

  • Developed and designed a web application for the Agriculture industry using C#/ASP .NET, JavaScript. Developed back-end calculation service to perform server-side calculations. Designed and developed data model.

• Led implementation of Advanced Analytics platform based on Microsoft Azure.

  • Worked with stakeholders to define Operating Model for managing and maintaining elements of the platform.

  • Led several technical streams for onboarding required data and functionality to Azure. Delivered solution architecture for streaming real-time operational data.

  • Execution lead for large EH & S platform project (15,000 users). Integrated team lead for Enterprise Integration platform.

• Developed and supported supported applications to provide real-time analytics, visualization, KPIs, metrics, data management, reporting, ETL, and integration capabilities for large oil sands production facilities. Technologies: C#, SQL, SQL Server, SSRS, Historians, Siemens XHQ, Python, OPC.
  • Project lead for Salesforce implementation project for large oil & gas business unit.

• Creating Tech Content as a freelancer for the content giant Pepper Content.

  • Submitted tech blogs on various popular topics for American Technology Consulting in 2500 words with a rating of 4.5/5.0.

  • Submitted a White Paper for Nous Infosystems in 1500 words with a rating of 5.0/5.0.

  • View all my submitted articles and blogs here.

• Led, managed/delivered concurrent transformational projects within the Production Measurement Integrity (PMI) program using the Cenovus project methodology. Facilitated steering & operating committee development of Business Intelligence & Analytics roadmap and solutions. Collaboration with Architecture and Data Services teams to achieve transformation in BI & Analytics solutions and service delivery.

  • Managed a transformational Data Warehouse / Business Intelligence project for Cenovus’ Production Data Management group using agile project execution methods.

  • Collaborated with business stakeholders to develop data warehouse solution (large Organizational Change Management effort).

  • Key activities in this project: current and future state analysis for a large user community, proof of concepts for data replication alternatives and several key architectural decisions, and an evaluation / selection of reporting tools.

• Led microservices implementation spanning several business units.
  • Transformed business processes and systems for the Enbridge volumetric allocations, scheduling, and operations group.

Technology: Oracle Fusion, Java, Web Services, SOA

• Led, planned and managed multiple concurrent projects for Environment, Health & Safety, and Emergency Response business group to deliver several business initiatives.
  • Managed budget, project teams, plans/schedules, vendor selection and procurement process, and project outcomes.
  • Created roadmap for several projects/solutions for in-year and future implementations.

• Defined solution approach for several projects based on initial triage of the business need.

  • Planned, scheduled, monitored activities of the project teams. Managed several global/distributed project teams. Led the multiple concurrent projects through requirements elicitation, design, development, analysis, testing, and deployment phases for Suncor Energy/Petro Canada.

  • Collaborated closely with business advisors and project teams to steward initiatives from conception to completion.

• Executed projects within the Upstream Plant and Field area, working through initiation, planning, execution, monitoring and control, and closure of projects.
  • Developer and architect and for large mission critical, integrated data warehouse solution. Worked with Field Data Capture, Production Accounting, Retail, HSE (Health Safety Environment), and Plant Systems business areas.
  • Defined solution architecture and business requirements for upstream oil and gas software applications. Defined AS-IS & TO-BE analysis of business processes, conducted interviews & workshops, elaborated business scenarios.
  • Developed custom interface (C# .Net class libraries) to Osisoft Historian in order to capture well test data for Oil Sands facility.
  • Solution Architect for Enterprise Historian implementation to provide centralized view of Historian data from field locations.
  • Performed gap analysis, data modeling & mapping, technical architecture, report specifications, user interface screen mock-ups.

Face Mask Detection system to detect face masks in static images as well as in real-time video streams. Own custom dataset was built using Bing Search API and Kaggle.

Inspired by Adrian Rosebrock's PyImageSearch Blog.
A Twitter Bot for GirlScript Foundation that automatically retweets, favourites the tweets and follows the users who tweet with hashtag #girlscript. Checkout my tech blog on how to create it HERE
Collaborated with the Developer Team to develop the front-end and deploy the website on Heroku for a pro-bono legal startup Caim Consulting.
Collection of small code gists along my Golang learning journey
This handbook covers a beginner-friendly detailed understanding of Kubernetes core concepts.
IntelliJ Idea Tips and Tricks for Java/Spring Microservices Handling
Repository dedicated to my #100DaysOfCode journey
Portfolio Website Version 1 hosted using GitHub Pages. Updates coming soon!
A real time face recognition system developed in Python using Pillow, OpenCV and NumPy libraries
My inbox is always open. Whether you have a question or just want to say hello, I'll try my best to get back to you!
